character.contactRunesMessage: {{name}} wishes to share their contact runes
character.followsPath: Follows the path of {{belief}}. Grants bonus efficiency to project workflows.

resource.staminaTooltip: Stress and deadline endurance. Higher stamina means greater tolerance for crunch periods.
resource.manaTooltip: Work time per day. Mana Regen: {{regen}}/hr. Increases by consuming mood-driving events.

characterInfo.name: Your Name
characterInfo.title: Full-Stack Developer
characterInfo.summary: A seasoned full-stack developer with a passion for building immersive web experiences. Skilled in both frontend artistry and backend architecture, this developer combines creativity with technical precision to craft exceptional digital solutions.

iq.label: IQ
iq.description: Raw cognitive processing power. Affects ability to learn new frameworks overnight.

intellect.label: Intellect
intellect.description: Deep understanding of complex systems. Increases critical thinking by 12%.

troubleshooting.label: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.description: Ability to diagnose and resolve bugs. Reduces debugging time by 40%.

problem-solving.label: Problem Solving
problem-solving.description: Creative approach to technical challenges. Grants a chance to find elegant solutions.

fast-learning.label: Fast Learning
fast-learning.description: Speed of acquiring new technologies. Increases XP gain from documentation by 25%.

prompt-gen.name: Prompt Generation
prompt-gen.description: Saves AI tokens, faster responses. Reduces mana cost of AI-assisted spells by 30%.

humor.name: Humor
humor.description: Team communication, grants mana regen to party. +5 Mana Regen to all nearby allies.

organizing.name: Organizing
organizing.description: Code architecture, documentation, schedules. Increases project completion speed by 20%.

responsible.name: Responsible
responsible.description: Finishes chores, strictly adheres to deadlines. Grants immunity to 'Missed Deadline' debuff.

uniqueSkill.name: Lazy Soul
uniqueSkill.description: Routine jobs are automatically automated by code, scripts, or AI. Passive effect: All repetitive tasks have a 100% chance to be delegated to automation.

frontend.name: Frontend Web Developer
frontend.description: Master of the visual realm. Crafts pixel-perfect interfaces using React, TypeScript, and modern CSS. Specializes in responsive design and animation enchantments.

backend.name: Backend Web Developer
backend.description: Architect of the server-side. Builds robust APIs and database systems using Node.js, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure. Expert in RESTful sorcery.

voip.name: VoIP Developer
voip.description: Specialist in real-time communications. Implements SIP, WebRTC, and telephony systems. Can establish voice channels across any network terrain.

talentDescriptions.html: The foundation of all web structures. Mastery of semantic markup and accessibility incantations.
talentDescriptions.css: The art of visual enchantment. Command over layouts, animations, and responsive transformations.
talentDescriptions.js: The language of interactivity. Wield the power of dynamic scripting and DOM manipulation.
talentDescriptions.scss: Advanced CSS sorcery. Variables, mixins, and nesting grant superior styling power.
talentDescriptions.php: Server-side scripting language. The old-world magic that still powers much of the web.
talentDescriptions.web-frontend: The convergence of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Unlocks React, Vue, and modern framework mastery.
talentDescriptions.react-native: Cross-platform mobile sorcery. Build native mobile apps using React's component model.
talentDescriptions.vuejs: The progressive framework. Reactive data binding and component composition for elegant interfaces.
talentDescriptions.yii2: High-performance PHP framework. MVC architecture with built-in security and caching enchantments.
talentDescriptions.laravel: The artisan's PHP framework. Eloquent ORM, Blade templating, and elegant syntax for rapid development.
talentDescriptions.mvc: Model-View-Controller architecture. The sacred pattern for organizing code into logical domains.
talentDescriptions.nodejs: Server-side JavaScript runtime. Harness the power of V8 to build scalable network applications.
talentDescriptions.nextjs: The React meta-framework. Server-side rendering, static generation, and API routes in one package.
talentDescriptions.backend-web: Full server-side mastery. REST APIs, authentication, database design, and deployment strategies.
talentDescriptions.restful-api: Representational State Transfer. Design and implement clean, resource-oriented web service interfaces.
talentDescriptions.ajax: Asynchronous JavaScript and XML. Enables dynamic page updates without full reloads.
talentDescriptions.socketio: Real-time event-based communication library. Bidirectional data flow between client and server.
talentDescriptions.websockets: Real-time bidirectional communication protocol. The ultimate synergy for live data streams.
talentDescriptions.relational-db: Structured data storage with tables, relations, and SQL query language. The bedrock of data persistence.
talentDescriptions.mysql: The most widely-used open-source relational database. Fast reads, reliable replication.
talentDescriptions.postgresql: Advanced open-source relational database. JSON support, full-text search, and extensibility.
talentDescriptions.nonrelational-db: Schema-less document stores for flexible, high-velocity data. Key-value and document models.
talentDescriptions.mongodb: Document-oriented NoSQL database. JSON-like documents with dynamic schemas for rapid iteration.
talentDescriptions.asterisk: Open-source telephony engine. The foundation of custom PBX systems and call routing.
talentDescriptions.pbx: Private Branch Exchange. Internal telephone switching system for enterprise communications.
talentDescriptions.freepbx: Open-source PBX management GUI. Simplifies Asterisk configuration with a web interface.
talentDescriptions.elastix: Unified communications platform built on Asterisk. Integrates email, IM, and fax with telephony.
talentDescriptions.cisco: Enterprise networking and communications. The industry standard for large-scale deployments.
talentDescriptions.cucm: Cisco Unified Communications Manager. Enterprise call control and session management.
talentDescriptions.uccx: Cisco Unified Contact Center Express. IVR, ACD, and call queuing for contact centers.
talentDescriptions.cuic: Cisco Unified Intelligence Center. Reporting and analytics for contact center operations.
talentDescriptions.cisco-ucs: Cisco Unified Contact Systems. Full-stack enterprise communication and contact management.
talentDescriptions.sip: Session Initiation Protocol. Signaling protocol for initiating, maintaining, and terminating voice sessions.
talentDescriptions.rtp: Real-time Transport Protocol. Delivers audio and video over IP networks with timing information.
talentDescriptions.webrtc: Web Real-Time Communication. Browser-native voice, video, and data channel capabilities.
talentDescriptions.tts-stt: Text-to-Speech and Speech-to-Text. Voice synthesis and recognition for IVR and accessibility.
talentDescriptions.ivr-dev: Interactive Voice Response systems. Automated call menus, DTMF handling, and call flow design.
talentDescriptions.redux: Global state management for React. A single store of truth that controls the flow of data across all components.

vscode.name: VS Code
vscode.description: Primary code editor. Enchanted with extensions for maximum productivity.

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Version control fortress. Houses all repositories and collaboration portals.

docker.name: Docker
docker.description: Containerization engine. Ensures consistent deployment across all realms.

figma.name: Figma
figma.description: Design tool of the UI artisan. Pixel-perfect mockups and prototypes.

postman.name: Postman
postman.description: API testing companion. Sends requests across the network realm.

jira.name: Jira
jira.description: Quest tracker. Manages tasks, sprints, and epic storylines.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Guild communication channel. Real-time messaging across all party members.

terminal.name: Terminal
terminal.description: Command-line interface. Direct access to system-level sorcery.

npm.name: NPM
npm.description: Package summoner. Calls forth libraries from the JavaScript registry.

chrome-devtools.name: Chrome DevTools
chrome-devtools.description: Browser inspection lens. Reveals the hidden DOM and network secrets.

git.name: Git
git.description: Time-travel device for code. Branch, merge, and revert through project history.

linux.name: Linux
linux.description: The open-source operating realm. Server management and scripting mastery.

aws.name: AWS
aws.description: Cloud infrastructure dominion. EC2, S3, Lambda — the pillars of deployment.

redis.name: Redis
redis.description: In-memory data cache. Lightning-fast reads for session and query storage.

nginx.name: Nginx
nginx.description: Reverse proxy guardian. Routes traffic and serves static assets with speed.

webpack.name: Webpack
webpack.description: Module bundler. Compiles and optimizes frontend assets into deployable bundles.

macos.name: macOS
macos.description: Primary operating realm. Stable Unix-based environment for development and daily questing.

windows.name: Windows
windows.description: Secondary operating realm. Familiar territory for enterprise tools and compatibility testing.

datagrip.name: DataGrip
datagrip.description: Database IDE of the data sorcerer. Query, inspect, and manage SQL realms with precision.

sftp.name: SFTP
sftp.description: Secure file transfer scroll. Moves artifacts between servers through encrypted tunnels.

zoom.name: Zoom / Eleveo
zoom.description: Video conferencing and collaboration portal. Bridges remote teams across any distance.

callreplay.name: CallReplay
callreplay.description: Call recording and playback artifact. Replay, review, and analyze recorded voice interactions.

grafana.name: Grafana
grafana.description: Monitoring oracle. Visualizes metrics and system vitals through real-time dashboards.

miro.name: Miro
miro.description: Infinite whiteboard of the architect. Maps out flows, plans, and collaborative blueprints.

freepbx.name: FreePBX
freepbx.description: VoIP control panel. Manages extensions, call routing, and telephony configurations.

elastrix.name: Elastrix
elastrix.description: Telephony platform artifact. Powers unified communications and VoIP infrastructure.

wireshark.name: Wireshark
wireshark.description: Network packet analyzer. Captures and deciphers raw traffic across the wire.

active-directory.name: Active Directory
active-directory.description: Domain authority. Manages identities, permissions, and access across the enterprise realm.

web-chat.title: Web-Chat Software
web-chat.description: Built a real-time web-chat application with WebSocket integration, user authentication, and message persistence. Handled concurrent connections and scaling challenges.

voip-platform.title: VoIP Communication Platform
voip-platform.description: Developed an enterprise-grade VoIP platform integrating Asterisk PBX with custom IVR flows, SIP trunking, and real-time call monitoring dashboards.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Portal
ecommerce.description: Architected a full-stack e-commerce solution with payment gateway integration, inventory management, and admin dashboard. Processed thousands of daily transactions.

crm-system.title: CRM System
crm-system.description: Designed and implemented a customer relationship management system with lead tracking, automated email campaigns, and analytics reporting.

api-gateway.title: API Gateway & Microservices
api-gateway.description: Built a centralized API gateway managing authentication, rate limiting, and routing across multiple microservices. Deployed with Docker and Kubernetes.

monitoring.title: Infrastructure Monitoring Suite
monitoring.description: Created a monitoring dashboard aggregating logs, metrics, and alerts from distributed systems. Integrated Grafana, Prometheus, and custom alert handlers.
